props.name: ariaDescribedby
props.description: Adds an aria-describedby to the list.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Adds an aria-label to the list.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Adds an aria-labelledby to the list.

props.name: disableItemPaddings
props.description: Removes padding around and inside list items.

props.name: disablePaddings
props.description: Removes top and bottom padding around the list. Does not apply for sortable lists.

props.name: i18nStrings
props.description:
An object containing all the localized strings required by the component.

- `liveAnnouncementDndStarted` ((position: number, total: number) => string) - (Optional) Adds a message to be announced by screen readers when an item is picked for reordering.
- `liveAnnouncementDndDiscarded` (string) - (Optional) Adds a message to be announced by screen readers when a reordering action is canceled.
- `liveAnnouncementDndItemReordered` ((initialPosition: number, currentPosition: number, total: number) => string) - (Optional) Adds a message to be announced by screen readers when an item is being moved.
- `liveAnnouncementDndItemCommitted` ((initialPosition: number, finalPosition: number, total: number) => string) - (Optional) Adds a message to be announced by screen readers when a reordering action is committed.
- `dragHandleAriaDescription` (string) - (Optional) Adds an ARIA description for the drag handle.
- `dragHandleAriaLabel` (string) - (Optional) Adds an ARIA label for the drag handle.

props.name: items
props.description: The items to display in the list.

props.name: renderItem
props.description:
Render an item. The function should return an object with the following keys:
* `id` (string) - A unique identifier for the item.
* `content` (unknown) - The content of the item.
* `secondaryContent` (unknown) - (Optional) Secondary content, for example item description.
* `icon` (unknown) - (Optional) An icon, displayed at the start.
* `actions` (unknown) - (Optional) Action button(s).
* `announcementLabel` (string) - (Optional) An announcement label for the item, used when sorting.
   By default, the `content` is used: a custom label should be provided if `content` is not a string.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Makes the list sortable by enabling drag and drop functionality.

props.name: sortDisabled
props.description: Disables sorting drag handles. Use this to temporarily prevent users from reordering the list.

props.name: tagOverride
props.description: The HTML tag to render. By default `ul` is used for standard lists and `ol` for sortable lists.

events.name: sortingChange
events.description: Called when items are reordered in a sortable list.
